name: RUNALL_VERIFIED_RESTRICTED_CONTINUATION_ENERGY_DIFFERENTIATION_AND_INTEGRATION_BY_PARTS_LEMMA_TARGET

runall_target_manifest.COMMIT_RULE: Commit only if the targeted verifier and targeted pytest pass.

lemma_statement_surface.state_regularization: u has enough time regularity to differentiate E_R(t) and enough spatial regularity for boundary traces on partial Sigma_R
lemma_statement_surface.differentiation_target: d/dt E_R(t) equals the paired time derivative of u plus differentiated lower-order control terms
lemma_statement_surface.integration_by_parts_target: spatial derivative terms from L_R are transformed into interior coercive terms plus boundary flux Flux_R(t)
lemma_statement_surface.shared_boundary_convention: outward normal on boundary of Sigma_R
lemma_statement_surface.output_for_derivative_identity: the differentiated energy identity and restricted integration-by-parts formula are available for PDE substitution

required_assumption_blocks.role: justify H^s spatial derivatives and lower-order control terms
justify boundary traces on partial Sigma_R
justify integration by parts for the principal spatial operator L_R
define the boundary flux term with the outward-normal convention

boundary: this artifact records the energy differentiation and integration-by-parts lemma target only
this artifact does not prove time regularity
this artifact does not prove spatial regularity
this artifact does not prove boundary trace existence
this artifact does not prove integration by parts
this artifact does not prove boundary flux identification
this artifact does not prove the derivative identity
this artifact does not prove the analytic estimate
this artifact does not prove full RR closure
this artifact does not prove Clay problem closure
finish_condition: Replace this target artifact with checked assumptions and derivations for time regularity, spatial regularity, trace existence, restricted integration by parts, and boundary flux identification on the same restricted continuation region.
